presentationFlow.title: Problem Statement
presentationFlow.talkTrack: Shadow AI is the #1 emerging data risk. Employees are pasting sensitive data into ChatGPT, Claude, and other AI tools without IT visibility.

presentationFlow.title: Discovery — What we found
presentationFlow.talkTrack: Using Cloud Discovery and audit logs, we detected AI tool usage across the organization.
showInPortal: Activity Explorer filtered to AI workloads

presentationFlow.title: Governance — How we protect
presentationFlow.talkTrack: We deployed tiered DLP policies: visibility for low risk, guardrails with justification for medium, and hard blocks for high-risk users.

presentationFlow.title: User Experience — Safe alternatives
presentationFlow.talkTrack: When a user tries to paste sensitive data into ChatGPT, they see a policy tip guiding them to use Copilot instead.

presentationFlow.title: Reporting — Compliance visibility
presentationFlow.talkTrack: Leadership gets dashboards showing shadow AI risk posture, policy effectiveness, and user compliance trends.

scenarios.name: Shadow AI Discovery
scenarios.description: Show cloud app discovery detecting AI tool usage
steps: Open Defender for Cloud Apps > Cloud Discovery
Show discovered apps with risk scores
Highlight data volume uploaded to unsanctioned AI apps
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Audience sees concrete evidence of shadow AI in environment
manualPrep: Cloud Discovery logs or Defender for Endpoint integration

scenarios.name: Data Protection — Live Block
scenarios.description: Demonstrate DLP blocking sensitive data paste to AI tools
steps: Paste content containing SSN or credit card number
DLP policy tip appears blocking the action
Show user is guided to use Copilot instead
Show Activity Explorer with the matched event
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Audience sees real-time protection in action
automatedArtifacts: Endpoint AI Site Restrictions DLP policy
manualPrep: Test device with Defender for Endpoint

scenarios.name: Risky User Detection
scenarios.description: Show insider risk escalation for repeat AI policy violations
steps: Show Shadow AI Risky Usage Watch policy
Demonstrate Adaptive Protection adjusting DLP from audit to block
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Audience sees adaptive, behavior-based security. Note: IRM template availability may vary in GCC.
automatedArtifacts: Adaptive DLP policy with risk-tiered rules
manualPrep: Generate some DLP alerts first to populate risk signals

scenarios.name: Sanctioned vs. Unsanctioned AI
scenarios.description: Contrast governed Copilot usage with blocked external AI
steps: Show Copilot interaction that is allowed and monitored
Show Communication Compliance capturing the interaction
Show external AI attempt being blocked
Compare: same data, different enforcement by tool
automatedArtifacts: DLP policies for Copilot vs Devices
manualPrep: Copilot license assigned to demo user (verify Copilot availability in GCC tenant)
